errors.app_password_required: Gmail (and other providers with 2-step verification) require an app-specific password instead of your normal password. Generate one and paste it in the Password field.
errors.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check the username and password. For Gmail/Outlook/iCloud use an app-specific password.
errors.connection_failed: Could not reach the mail server. Check the IMAP/SMTP host and port, and your internet connection.
errors.tls_error: Secure connection (TLS) failed. Check the port and encryption settings.
errors.binary_unavailable: The email engine could not be downloaded. Check your internet connection and try again.

empty.title: Connect your email
empty.description: Add a mail account to read, search and send email from Dome and let Many help you with your inbox.

body.imagesBlocked: Images are blocked to protect your privacy
body.sanitized: Unsafe elements have been removed from the message

empty.title: Select a message
empty.subtitle: Pick a message from the list to read it here

settings.title: Email accounts
settings.description: Connect IMAP/SMTP accounts. Passwords are encrypted on this device and never leave it.
settings.app_password_hint: For Gmail, Outlook or iCloud, use an app-specific password.

guides.title: Setup tips
guides.outlook_imap_enabled: IMAP is enabled by default in Outlook
guides.icloud_imap: Generate an app-specific password in Apple ID
guides.fastmail_app_password: Use an app password if 2FA is on
guides.custom_manual: Enter IMAP and SMTP details from your provider

settings.required_fields: Email, IMAP host and SMTP host are required.
